_**Agent (composer-2)**_


Here’s what was done:

1. **`npm install`** — Dependencies are installed (492 packages).
2. **`npm run dev`** — The first attempt failed in the sandbox because Vite calls `os.networkInterfaces()`, which the sandbox blocks. Running with full permissions fixed it.

The app is running:

- **Local:** [http://localhost:8081/](http://localhost:8081/)  
- Port **8080** was already taken, so Vite chose **8081**.

To start it yourself later (from the project root):

```bash
npm install   # first time only
npm run dev
```

If you see the same `uv_interface_addresses` error, run the terminal **outside** Cursor’s restricted sandbox or use “Run with full permissions” if your setup has that option.

**Note:** `npm audit` reported some vulnerabilities; you can review with `npm audit` and optionally `npm audit fix` when you’re ready.

---

_**User**_

Your
Challenge
GlobeHack Season 1 Case Study
Arizona State University · April 18–19, 2026
Reimagine the AI-Native Lofty Experience
The Lofty Platform Today
When a user logs in today, they see a dashboard of powerful
modules — but have to do the prioritization themselves:
Need Keep in Touch
Contacts due for
follow-up based on
relationship milestones
Today's
Opportunities
High-priority leads
flagged by behavioral AI
Transactions
Active deals tracked from
offer to closing
Appointments &
Showings
Scheduled tours and
client meetings
My Listings
Properties the agent is
marketing for sale
Hot Sheets
Real-time MLS filters with
buyer matching
lofty.com · Powerful modules. Users still do thThe Lofty Problem
With a platform that can do everything, how do we pick
what gets front stage?
AI capabilities exist
Lead scoring, behavioral signals, Smart Plans — all running in the background
But they aren't front-and-center
The daily experience still feels like a traditional widget dashboard
How should users FIRST EXPERIENCE Lofty as an AI-native platform?
Your Mission: Pick an Entry Point
Reimagine how users first experience Lofty as an AI-native platform.
Dashboard Redesign Transform the daily landing page from static widgets to an AI-driven command center
AI Command Center A new conversational interface where users tell AI what they want to accomplish
Morning Briefing AI proactively tells users what matters today and exactly what actions to take
Onboarding Flow How new users are introduced to AI capabilities and build trust with the platform
Something Else Surprise us — if you see a better entry point, go for it. We love bold thinking.What to Deliver
1. A Demo of Your Vision
· Interactive prototype (Figma, Framer, or similar)
· Coded demo — React, HTML, or any framework
· Video walkthrough demonstrating the experience
 Use realistic content: real estate data, agent names, property
details
2. Design Rationale
· Why you chose this entry point and what problem it
solves
· Key design decisions and trade-offs you made
· What you'd build next with more time
 Annotations in prototype, written summary, or narrated video
Use AI tools! Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, v0, Galileo — AI usage is encouraged and evaluated as part of your
submission.
Questions to Guide Your Thinking
Why this entry point?
What specific user problem are you solving with your chosen
approach?
Who is the target user?
What are their daily goals, pain points, and concerns about AI?
What makes it AI-native?
How is this fundamentally different from just adding AI features on
top?
How does it build trust?
How does your design address skepticism from users new to AI
tools?
What trade-offs did you make?
What did you cut, and what would you build next with more time?
How would you measure success?
If this shipped, what metrics would tell you it's working? look into what we built answer these for us like i have uploaded old dashboard image here
